history.action: 实施 semantic upgrade-only 模式
history.result: upgrade_only=True: confirm+sem_allow→confirm(保持), confirm+sem_block→block(升级仍有效). 1075 tests, commit 8d19994.
history.rationale: Loop 72 发现语义门 downgrade confirm→allow 导致 46 个有害案例被放行(TPR 100%→77%)。根因: _apply_semantic_verdict 的 confirm 分支无条件允许 allow 降级。修复: 新增 upgrade_only 标志, True 时跳过降级。完整 benchmark 因 API 延迟超时, 但逻辑已通过单元测试验证。

history.action: M12.4 ablation audit + script fix + paper table update

history.hypothesis: Ablation fast-mode data is valid for measuring component contributions at L1+L2 level
history.rationale: M12.4 audit caught critical bug: ablation script omitted session_context, disabling chain-aware rules. After fix, data is clean and publishable. Datalog (L1) confirmed as sole L1+L2 detection mechanism (ΔL=+0.700 when removed).

history.action: Error taxonomy of v3 failures + v3 L1+L2 baseline + paper update (5 contributions)
history.result: v3 L1+L2 TPR=12.7%/FPR=6.7%. L3 contributes +62.6pp on v3 (increases with difficulty). Error taxonomy: 46.8% structural, 53.2% addressable. Paper abstract/contributions/Table4/Discussion updated.
history.hypothesis: Generalization gap is random noise across failure cases
history.result_hypothesis: REFUTED — failures are highly structured: 34/74 FN are Hijacking (indirect prompt injection, architectural limitation), 42/79 are addressable rule gaps deliberately left unfixed
history.rationale: Dario mandated research-first direction: no benchmark overfitting. Error taxonomy is a paper-level contribution that honestly characterizes the generalization gap. L1+L2 baseline on v3 reveals L3's contribution INCREASES on harder data (+62.6pp vs +45.4pp on v2).
history.prev_loop_ref: Loop 81 verified paper numbers; Loop 82 adds new data and analysis

history.action: M12.1 no_kg full-mode ablation + provider bug fix + git push unblocked
history.result: no_kg: TPR 100.0%, FPR 0.0%, ΔL=0.0. KG adds zero marginal detection value on training set. Ablation script fixed (missing provider). Git push via HTTPS unblocked. Paper Table 4 updated.
history.hypothesis: KG context (Markov Blanket) contributes measurable detection improvement
history.result_hypothesis: REFUTED on training set — KG ΔL=0.0. L1 Datalog catches 100% without KG. Need to test on v3 held-out where L1-only TPR is 12.7% to see if KG helps semantic gate on harder cases.
history.rationale: M12.1 was the last missing ablation condition. Found and fixed critical bug: ablation script created SemanticGateConfig without provider → semantic gate returned None (FAIL_OPEN) on every call → would have measured L1+L2 not L1+L2+L3. After fix, result is clean: KG is decorative on training set where L1 already achieves 100%.
history.prev_loop_ref: Loop 82 did error taxonomy + v3 L1+L2 baseline
